title: mentha aquatica subvar. erronema
intro: Mentha aquatica subvar. erronema, also known as Water Mint, is a variety of the water mint plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems due to their anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Water Mint include its ability to alleviate nausea, relieve stress, and promote a good night's sleep, as well as its potential to help with colds and flu due to its antimicrobial properties. Water Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal benefits.
